interpretation: objective value cannot authorize encoded-compliance wording when residual evidence is positive
residual and catalog evidence authorize only the encoded claim level

operator_input: same candidate plus declared code-like claim
interpretation: adding compatible independent oracle evidence can raise the supported level from encoded evidence to partial code-oracle support
new evidence that contradicts the encoded claim triggers downgrade or blocking rather than monotone escalation
AISC catalog audit evidence cannot be promoted to AISC approval or professional certification
reapplying the operator to the same candidate and unchanged evidence record cannot increase the claim level
uncertainty probing records the boundary but does not authorize robust-design wording
